title: Application - Update from previous app version while using guest account (TBD)
scenario: App update from previous version fails or behaves unexpectedly when using a guest account in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the app is currently signed in using a Guest account.
3. Navigate to the device's app settings (e.g., via Android Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile) or the Google Play Store.
4. Trigger an update of the Poly Studio Mobile app from the previous version to the latest available version.
5. After the update completes, relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the app's state, including the account session and any onboarding or setup screens.
expected: The app updates successfully while retaining the Guest account session. After relaunch, the user remains logged in as Guest and can continue using the app without being prompted to sign in again or losing any settings.
